properties.titulo_evento: Rubio ratchets up pressure on NATO at key summit
properties.descricao: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is casting new doubt on NATO's relevance after key allies recoiled from backing Washington’s “Operation Epic Fury.”

properties.titulo_evento: Taiwan says it has not been told by US of arms sales delays
properties.descricao: U.S. President Donald Trump said following a summit with China’s Xi Jinping in Beijing last week that he was undecided on whether to approve it.

properties.titulo_evento: In shift, Trump announces deployment of 5,000 US troops to Poland
properties.descricao: A week after cancelling a U.S. Army deployment to Poland, Trump announces an additional 5,000 troops will be sent to the country.

properties.titulo_evento: Poland joins Pentagon’s counter-drone marketplace amid unexpected US deployment cancellation
properties.descricao: The Army is continuing to expand military cooperation with Poland through the Pentagon’s counter-drone initiative, the service announced on Wednesday.

properties.descricao: During Congressional testimony from Department of Defense leadership last week, Representative George Whitesides asked Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth, “How does canceling a command-initiated review support a culture of accountability?R...

properties.titulo_evento: Iran move World Cup base from US to Mexico with FIFA approval
properties.descricao: Iran were expected to fly from Turkiye to Arizona to continue World Cup 2026 preparations but will switch to Mexico.

properties.titulo_evento: Pakistan army chief visits Tehran to push for end to US-Israeli war on Iran
properties.descricao: Munir met senior Iranian officials on Saturday as Islamabad and Doha push to finalise a memorandum to end the war.

properties.titulo_evento: ‘United States of the Middle East?’: Trump posts US flag covering Iran
properties.descricao: Latest Truth Social post comes amid 'delicate diplomacy', expert says, as US and Iran indicate progress in talks.

properties.titulo_evento: Overnight Israeli strikes on Gaza leave behind heavy destruction
properties.descricao: Overnight Israeli strikes devastated the Nuseirat and Bureij refugee camps in central Gaza despite an ongoing ceasefire.

properties.titulo_evento: US Secretary of State kicks off India visit, invites Modi to White House
properties.descricao: US-Israel war with Iran among issues looming large as Rubio expected to seek to mend in ties with New Delhi.

properties.titulo_evento: Five police officers, 13 year-old boy killed in Israeli attack on Gaza
properties.descricao: Attack on a police post in northern Gaza comes as dozens of people were wounded in Israeli attacks in the past 48 hours.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran 'getting a lot closer' to agreement with US, Trump says
properties.descricao: Tehran also signals progress on talks but says the key issue of nuclear weapons is not part of an initial framework it is working on.

properties.titulo_evento: Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
properties.descricao: Ukraine says it struck Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit in a Moscow-occupied region.

properties.titulo_evento: Rubio meets Modi during India visit with energy high on agenda
properties.descricao: The secretary of state wants to sell US energy to Delhi to make up for shortfalls caused by the Iran war.

properties.titulo_evento: Rubio tries to reassure Nato allies over US troop deployments
properties.descricao: President Donald Trump says he wants to send more troops to Poland, a week after his officials cancelled a similar deployment.

properties.titulo_evento: Carney says Alberta is 'essential' to Canada as province plans vote on separation
properties.descricao: Alberta's decision to hold a referendum on separation has been widely criticised, including by separatists who say the question is not definitive enough.

properties.titulo_evento: 'Significant movement here in Washington': US and Iran report progress towards deal on ending war
properties.descricao: FRANCE 24 correspondent Fraser Jackson speaks from Washington, DC on the reported progress in the talks on ending the US-Israeli war on Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: AI, Palantir & the Pushback: Sadiq Khan's much discussed decision over Met Police contract
properties.descricao: As concerns continue to grow over artificial intelligence, national security and digital sovereignty, London Mayor Sadiq Khan has blocked a proposed fifty-million-pound contract between the Metropolitan Police and AI giant Palantir. The company had ...

properties.titulo_evento: 'Fjord' by Romania's Cristian Mungiu wins Palme d'Or at Cannes Film Festival
properties.descricao: The Norway-set drama "Fjord" by Romanian director Cristian Mungiu was awarded the Palme d'Or at the closing ceremony of the 79th Cannes Film Festival as critics hailed a strong field of contenders directed by auteurs from Russia, Iran, Japan and bey...

properties.titulo_evento: Russia says 16 killed in strike on student dorm that it blamed on Ukraine
properties.descricao: The death toll from a drone strike ​on a student dorm in the Russian-controlled Luhansk region of eastern Ukraine has risen to 16, with most of the victims young women, Russian officials said on Saturday, after a heated U.N. debate on the incident.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran, US and Pakistan report progress in talks on ending war
properties.descricao: Washington, Tehran and mediator Islamabad all said on Saturday that progress had been made on ending the US-Israeli war on Iran, with a Pakistani security official saying that a memorandum of understanding was being "fine-tuned".

properties.titulo_evento: Cheap attack drones break through Israel's Iron Dome
properties.descricao: Inexpensive fiber-optic drones are challenging Israel's high-tech defenses, shifting the military balance in the Middle East.

properties.titulo_evento: US, Iran strike upbeat tone as Hormuz deal takes shape
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump flagged progress in talks with Iran, Tehran has warned that major gaps still stand in the way of dialing down the conflict.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Germany marks Constitution Day
properties.descricao: Germany is commemorating the day its Basic Law came into effect 77 years ago. And a record number of German passports were issued in 2025, media report. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: China: Dozens dead in coal mine blast — state media
properties.descricao: An explosion in a coal mine in northern China has killed at least 82 people, with some still unaccounted for, state media say. President Xi Jinping has demanded an "all-out" effort to search for and rescue those missing.

properties.titulo_evento: US or Iran: Who will win the Hormuz endurance game?
properties.descricao: Tehran is betting that its sanctions‑hardened economy can outlast the Strait of Hormuz crisis. Washington, meanwhile, is contending with elevated oil prices, renewed inflation pressure and rising global recession risks.

properties.titulo_evento: France bans Israel’s Ben-Gvir from entry
properties.descricao: French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot also called for EU sanctions on the far-right Israeli minister, who has been widely criticized for taunting activists aboard the Global Sumud flotilla.

properties.titulo_evento: France scales down border checks at Dover port amid chaotic delays
properties.descricao: At the start of a hot bank holiday weekend, lengthy queues had formed at Dover port in what its authorities described as a challenging situation.

properties.titulo_evento: Lithuania calls for frozen Russian assets to return to Ukraine funding debate
properties.descricao: Lithuania’s foreign minister says the EU loan deal only postponed the fight over whether to tap frozen Russian assets to fund Ukraine and pressure Moscow.

properties.titulo_evento: EU reportedly nixes UK pitch for single market in goods
properties.descricao: The proposal comes as Britain’s embattled prime minister has vowed to put his country at the heart of Europe again.

properties.titulo_evento: Sweden backs Ukraine’s path to NATO, defense chief says
properties.descricao: Sweden’s Defense Minister Pål Jonson said Kyiv’s battle-tested army and fast-growing defense industry would strengthen the alliance, even as some NATO members remain opposed.

properties.titulo_evento: Stocks Gain for 8th Week Amid Impasse Over Reopening Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: Nearly three months since the fighting began, disagreements remain over the fate of Iran’s uranium stockpile and transit fees for the Strait of Hormuz.

properties.titulo_evento: Asian Currencies Hit by Iran War, Adding to Economic Strain
properties.descricao: Soaring oil prices and a surging dollar are testing Asia’s foreign-exchange reserves, which were built up after the 1997 crisis.
